peacemaker.name: Friedensstifter
peacemaker.desc: Verstärkt positive und dämpft negative Beziehungsänderungen

perfektionist.name: Perfektionist
perfektionist.unlockHint: Hit 100% Accuracy in a single gig.

virtuoso.name: Virtuoso
virtuoso.unlockHint: Complete a solo without missing a note.

techWizard.unlockHint: Get 100% Accuracy on a Technical song.

partyAnimal.unlockHint: Buy the beer fridge and drain it.

blastMachine.name: Blast Beat Machine
blastMachine.unlockHint: Maintain a 50+ combo during a fast section (>160 BPM).

clumsy.name: Clumsy
clumsy.desc: Increased failure chance on physical stunts

melodicGenius.name: Melodic Genius
melodicGenius.unlockHint: Maintain a 30+ combo in a slow song (<120 BPM).
